questions: Is dental treatment covered under this policy?

answers.answer: Dental treatment is covered under certain conditions, such as emergency inpatient dental treatment arising from an accident, and dental surgery outside India. However, there may be waiting periods and exclusions that apply, such as a 30-day waiting period for out-patient benefits and exclusions for pre-existing diseases and specified diseases/procedures.
answers.justification: Clauses 14 and 8 of the policy document

relevant_clauses.content: Emergency Inpatient Dental Treatment arising from an Accident
